description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a beige exterior, featuring a combination of flat and gable roofs. The front facade includes two prominent garage doors, a driveway, and several large windows, some with white framing. The property is surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with bushes and trees, providing privacy and greenery. The rear of the house has a fenced backyard and additional windows, suggesting multiple rooms with natural light. The roofline is varied, with both flat and pitched sections, and the house appears to have a modern yet practical design. The overall structure is rectangular with attached garages and a clear separation between front and back yards.
description: A beige two-story suburban house with flat and gable roofs, garages, and landscaped yards surrounded by fencing and trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the beige exterior, flat roof sections, and a fenced yard with trees and bushes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting two garage doors, a driveway, and the main entry area with landscaping.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying more windows, a fenced backyard, and additional greenery.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing a large flat-roofed section, multiple windows, and a private backyard enclosed by fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double garage entry with a main door, minimal steps, no porch, and simple landscaping
